steps.text: The Q1 financial report shows total revenue of 2.4 million dollars, up eight percent from Q4.
Subscription revenue contributed 1.1 million dollars of the Q1 total.
The remaining revenue came from one-time license sales and consulting fees.
Operating costs stayed flat at 1.8 million dollars during the same quarter.
The company therefore closed Q1 with a positive operating margin driven by subscription growth.
The store sold 340 units of the standard model in March.
The premium model sold 120 units in the same month.
Combined March sales reached 460 units across both models.
April forecasts suggest similar volumes, with a slight shift toward the premium model.
Inventory planning allocates 300 standard and 160 premium units for April.
Laporan penjualan bulan Mei mencatat pendapatan sebesar 450 juta rupiah.
Sekitar 60 persen pendapatan berasal dari penjualan daring melalui marketplace.
Sisanya berasal dari toko fisik di Bandung dan Surabaya.
Biaya operasional bulan Mei tercatat 320 juta rupiah, sedikit turun dari April.
Dengan demikian laba operasional Mei membaik dibanding bulan sebelumnya.
The marketing budget for the campaign was set at 50 thousand dollars.
Roughly 30 thousand dollars went to paid social media advertising.
The campaign generated about 4,200 sign-ups over six weeks.
That works out to a customer acquisition cost of roughly twelve dollars per sign-up.
The acquisition cost is within the target range set before the campaign.
Anggaran proyek renovasi kantor disetujui sebesar 200 juta rupiah.
Pengeluaran untuk material bangunan mencapai 110 juta rupiah.
Biaya jasa kontraktor tercatat 70 juta rupiah.
Total pengeluaran sejauh ini adalah 180 juta rupiah dari anggaran.
Masih tersisa sekitar 20 juta rupiah untuk pekerjaan finishing.
Water boils at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
At higher altitudes the atmospheric pressure is lower than at sea level.
Lower pressure reduces the boiling point of water.
In high mountain regions water can boil at around 90 degrees Celsius.
Cooking times at altitude are therefore longer because the water is cooler while boiling.
Photosynthesis converts carbon dioxide and water into glucose using light energy.
The process takes place mainly in the chloroplasts of plant leaves.
Chlorophyll absorbs mostly red and blue light while reflecting green.
This reflection is why most leaves appear green to the human eye.
Plants in low light conditions often grow larger leaves to capture more light.
The human heart pumps roughly five liters of blood per minute at rest.
During intense exercise cardiac output can rise to over twenty liters per minute.
The increase comes from both a faster heart rate and a larger stroke volume.
Regular endurance training improves stroke volume over time.
Trained athletes therefore often have lower resting heart rates than untrained people.
Lithium-ion batteries store energy through the movement of lithium ions between electrodes.
Charging moves the ions from the cathode to the anode.
Repeated charge cycles gradually degrade the electrode materials.
Most consumer batteries retain about eighty percent capacity after five hundred full cycles.
Avoiding extreme temperatures helps slow this degradation.
Gunung berapi terbentuk di zona pertemuan lempeng tektonik.
Indonesia terletak di pertemuan tiga lempeng besar sehingga memiliki banyak gunung berapi aktif.
Aktivitas vulkanik dipantau melalui sensor seismik dan pengamatan visual.
Peningkatan gempa vulkanik sering menjadi tanda awal aktivitas magma.
Status gunung dinaikkan bila indikator-indikator tersebut menunjukkan tren peningkatan.
To deploy the service, first build the container image from the release branch.
Next, push the image to the internal registry with the version tag.
Update the staging manifest to reference the new image tag.
Run the smoke test suite against the staging environment.
If the smoke tests pass, promote the same image to production.
Untuk membuat rendang, potong daging sapi menjadi ukuran sedang.
Haluskan bumbu berupa cabai, bawang merah, bawang putih, dan lengkuas.
Tumis bumbu halus hingga harum lalu masukkan daging dan santan.
Masak dengan api kecil sambil sesekali diaduk selama kurang lebih empat jam.
Rendang siap disajikan ketika kuah mengering dan berwarna cokelat gelap.
Backup dimulai dengan mengekspor basis data ke berkas dump terkompresi.
Berkas dump kemudian dienkripsi sebelum dipindahkan.
Salinan terenkripsi diunggah ke penyimpanan objek di dua wilayah berbeda.
Skrip verifikasi membandingkan checksum berkas sumber dan berkas unggahan.
Proses dianggap selesai setelah checksum cocok dan log backup diperbarui.
Start the onboarding by creating the new employee's account in the directory service.
Assign the account to the appropriate team groups and mailing lists.
Provision a laptop with the standard development image.
Schedule the security briefing within the first week.
Confirm completion of all onboarding steps in the HR checklist.
Proses klaim asuransi dimulai dengan mengisi formulir daring.
Lampirkan foto kerusakan dan salinan polis pada formulir tersebut.
Tim penilai akan meninjau dokumen dalam waktu tiga hari kerja.
Jika disetujui, surveyor akan menjadwalkan inspeksi lapangan.
Pembayaran klaim diproses setelah laporan inspeksi diterima.
The Mekong River flows through six countries in Southeast Asia.
It originates on the Tibetan Plateau and empties into the South China Sea.
The river delta in Vietnam is a major rice-producing region.
Seasonal flooding deposits nutrient-rich sediment across the delta.
Farmers time their planting cycles around these seasonal floods.
Jakarta is located on the northwest coast of Java.
The city sits on low-lying land crossed by thirteen rivers.
Parts of northern Jakarta lie below sea level and face regular flooding.
Land subsidence from groundwater extraction worsens the flooding risk.
The government has invested in sea walls and improved drainage to manage the risk.
The Sahara is the largest hot desert in the world.
It spans roughly nine million square kilometers across North Africa.
Daytime temperatures commonly exceed forty degrees Celsius in summer.
Despite the heat, the desert supports oasis settlements around groundwater sources.
Trade routes have connected these oases for centuries.
Danau Toba di Sumatera Utara adalah danau vulkanik terbesar di dunia.
Danau ini terbentuk dari letusan supervulkan puluhan ribu tahun lalu.
Di tengah danau terdapat Pulau Samosir yang berpenghuni.
Kawasan Toba kini menjadi destinasi wisata unggulan nasional.
Pemerintah mengembangkan infrastruktur jalan dan bandara untuk mendukung pariwisata di sana.
Norway has an extensive coastline shaped by glacial fjords.
The fjords were carved by glaciers during successive ice ages.
Deep fjord waters allow large vessels to dock close to small coastal towns.
Coastal shipping remains an important transport link for these communities.
Tourism on the fjord routes peaks during the summer months.
The support team received a spike of tickets after the Tuesday release.
Most tickets reported slow loading on the dashboard page.
Engineering traced the slowdown to an unindexed database query introduced in the release.
A hotfix adding the missing index was deployed Wednesday morning.
Ticket volume returned to normal levels within a day of the hotfix.
The bakery introduced a new sourdough loaf in February.
Customer feedback in the first month was largely positive.
Weekend batches consistently sold out before noon.
The bakery increased weekend production by half in March.
Even with higher production, weekend demand still occasionally exceeds supply.
Tim produk meluncurkan fitur pembayaran cicilan pada bulan April.
Adopsi fitur tumbuh stabil di kalangan pengguna usia muda.
Data menunjukkan nilai keranjang rata-rata naik pada transaksi cicilan.
Tim risiko memantau tingkat gagal bayar selama tiga bulan pertama.
Tingkat gagal bayar sejauh ini masih dalam batas yang direncanakan.
The library extended its opening hours during exam season.
Student visits increased noticeably in the evening slots.
Staff scheduling was adjusted to cover the added hours.
A survey collected student feedback on the extended schedule.
Based on the positive responses, the library plans to repeat the program next semester.
The logistics company piloted electric vans on three urban delivery routes.
Fuel and maintenance costs on the pilot routes dropped during the trial.
Drivers reported quieter operation and easier city maneuvering.
Charging schedules were integrated into the overnight depot routine.
The company is now evaluating an expansion of the electric fleet to ten routes.
User asks why the mobile app logs them out every morning.
Support explains that session tokens expire after twelve hours of inactivity.
The user confirms they typically use the app only in the evening.
Support suggests enabling the remember-me option to extend the session.
The user enables the option and confirms the morning logouts have stopped.
Pengguna menanyakan cara mengubah alamat pengiriman pesanan yang sudah dibuat.
CS menjelaskan bahwa alamat masih bisa diubah selama pesanan belum dikemas.
Pengguna mengecek status pesanan dan ternyata masih diproses.
CS memandu pengguna mengubah alamat melalui menu detail pesanan.
Alamat berhasil diperbarui dan pengguna menerima email konfirmasi.
A customer reports that exported CSV files show garbled characters in Excel.
The agent identifies the issue as a missing byte-order mark for UTF-8 encoding.
The agent shares a workaround using the import wizard with UTF-8 selected.
The customer confirms the workaround displays the characters correctly.
The agent files a product request to add the byte-order mark to future exports.
Pengguna melaporkan tagihan langganan terpotong dua kali bulan ini.
CS memeriksa riwayat transaksi dan menemukan duplikasi pembayaran pada tanggal yang sama.
CS mengajukan pengembalian dana untuk transaksi duplikat tersebut.
Pengembalian dana diproses ke metode pembayaran asal dalam lima hari kerja.
Pengguna mengonfirmasi dana sudah kembali dan kasus ditutup.
A user asks how to share a project board with an external contractor.
The assistant explains guest accounts with view-only or edit permissions.
The user chooses view-only access for the contractor.
The assistant walks through sending the guest invitation from board settings.
The contractor accepts the invitation and can now view the board.
